LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JILLA ISAACSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 ------------------------------------------------------------------- AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST PAY $560 IN ATTORNEY FEES TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. FURTHER, THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO POST A BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $30,000. PARTIES NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S RULING BY TELEPHONE. MR. NOURMAND IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.

Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Continued To Nov-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JILLA ISAACSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.
Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald (922.5939) for plaintiff and opposing party; Joseph H. Nourmand of the Law Offices of H. Joseph Nourmand (213.688.2888) appearing via court call for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court took the matter under submission. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
----
After hearing the court ruled as follows: Defendant's motion to set aside default and for leave to defend is granted. Plaintiff's motion for attorney fees is granted. Defendant must pay $560 in attorney fees to plaintiff's attorney. Further, the court orders the defendant is required to post a bond in the amount of $30,000. Parties notified of the court's ruling by telephone. Mr. Nourmand is directed to submit a proposed form of order.
